svg.title: Webhook Delivery Engine Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing the full flow from client API call through FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis queue, Celery worker, and webhook endpoint delivery with retry logic.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client send to the webhook engine?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI layer do in the webhook engine?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store in the webhook engine?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis work as a message broker in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does the Celery worker do in the webhook engine?')
sendPrompt('How does the webhook endpoint verify the HMAC signature?')
sendPrompt('Explain the exponential backoff retry logic in detail')
sendPrompt('What happens to deliveries in the dead letter queue?')
sendPrompt('What does the metrics endpoint expose?')

svg.text: Click any component to learn more
